ConnectionStrings._comment: Local SQL Server (default instance) with SQL auth. Master DB drives tenant-registry lookups; per-tenant connection strings are derived from this at request time (same server + creds, different Database). To switch to a remote dev SQL Server, change the Server value below + the Password.

Identity._comment: URL the Enki Identity OIDC server listens on. WebApi fetches OIDC discovery from here to validate bearer tokens.

Licensing._comment: Dev RSA private key copied into bin via SDI.Enki.WebApi.csproj. Production sets PrivateKeyPath to an absolute path (or via Enki__Licensing__PrivateKeyPath env var) — the generator refuses to start if the file is missing.
